title: Tapping for the Ageing Body
subtitle: A five-minute tapping practice for the body that is changing, not failing
excerpt: A five-minute tapping practice for the body that is changing. Used when the mirror feels unfriendly, when the joints hurt where they used not to, when the body the marketing world says you should have is not the body you have.
sourceNotes: Original to homemade.education. The tapping shape is EFT. EFT was made by Gary Craig in the mid-1990s.

practice.whenToUse: Use when the mirror feels unfriendly, when the joints ache in new places, or when the marketing-world body sits in your head and your body does not measure up.

content.text: A five-minute tapping practice for the body that is changing with age. The body is doing what bodies do. The script gives the grief and the resistance somewhere to go.
New to tapping? Read
how EFT tapping works
first.
The practice
Karate chop (repeat x3)
Even though my body is changing and parts of it look and feel different than they used to, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though there are days when I do not like what I see in the mirror, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though the marketing-world body is not my body, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Tapping round
**Eyebrow:** My body is changing.
**Side of eye:** Some of the changes are hard to look at.
**Under eye:** I feel a grief for the younger body.
**Under nose:** The marketing world tells me I should have stayed the same.
**Chin:** Nobody stays the same.
**Collarbone:** The body is doing what bodies do.
**Under arm:** I am still in here.
**Top of head:** I am tired of fighting my own body.
Reframe to positive
**Eyebrow:** My body is changing, the way every body changes.
**Side of eye:** I can let the hard parts be hard.
**Under eye:** I can grieve the younger body and love this one.
**Under nose:** I do not have to buy what the marketing world is selling.
**Chin:** This body carries me.
**Collarbone:** I can be on its side.
**Under arm:** I have years with this body still to live.
**Top of head:** I can let it be the body it is now.
Tap the round three times. Then tap the reframe three times.
Where this practice comes from
Original to homemade.education. The tapping shape is EFT. EFT was made by Gary Craig in the mid-1990s.
